text: - **`trellis-adapter` skipped** — the `protocol_subscription` example applies plans by hand (matching on `ResourceCommand` from `result.resource_plan.commands()`), so the adapter is not needed for the spine. Path-dep resolution worked first try (trellis-core's `edition.workspace = true` resolved via its own workspace root; Cargo added trellis-core 0.2.1 + trellis-testing 0.2.1 to the lock).
